Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). Cut the eggplants in half lengthwise, scoop out the flesh, and chop it finely. Mix the chopped eggplant with tomatoes, onions, garlic, olives, and spices. Stuff the eggplant shells with the mixture and bake for 25-30 minutes until golden.
